item.description:
💫Welcome to Hieen story!
1.  All supplies are available.
2.  Guarantee brand quality, you can buy with confidence.
3.  Ready stock Products, shipping in 24 hours.
4.  Dispatch from Bankn. Under normal circumstances, you can receive packages on 1-3 days.
5.  If you have any questions, please contact customer service immediately.

Barang sudah ada di Jakarta Utara dengan stok banyak dan bisa dikirim cepat.
🧑🎤 Berlaku untuk produk-produk berikut.
✅ Kompatibel dengan Android/iPhone
✅ Kompatibel dengan PC/Laptop
✅ Untuk perangkat berkemampuan Bluetooth

🧑🎤Parameter produk
⭐ 【Model】: M10
⭐ 【Kualitas suara】: 10D Bass HiFi Stereo
⭐ 【Nama Produk】: Headset Bluetooth Nirkabel
⭐[Metode pemakaian]: Di telinga
⭐ 【Versi Bluetooth】: 5.1
⭐ 【Earphone】: 80mAh
⭐ 【power bank】: 3800mAh
⭐ 【Antarmuka pengisian daya】:  M10,M19,M30,F9-5:USB Mirco      (G36-G42:TYPE-C)
⭐【Peralatan yang berlaku】: Ponsel/komputer/perangkat Bluetooth
⭐【Tingkat tahan air】: IPX7
⭐【Jarak komunikasi】: 15m


🧑🎤Detail operasi
⭐1. Putar/Jeda (Kiri/Kanan x 1)
⭐2. Volume + (R x 3)
⭐3. Volume - (P x 3)
⭐4. Lewati ke lagu sebelumnya (panjang x 2)
⭐5. Lewati ke lagu berikutnya (R x 2)
⭐6. Jawab/Akhir (Kiri/Kanan x 1)
⭐7. Seri pemanggilan (kiri/kanan x 2 detik)

Di dalam kotak (kemasan):
1 x TWS Bluetooth headset (telinga kiri dan kanan)
1 wadah pengisi daya
1 x kabel pengisi daya USB
1 x Panduan Pengguna

item.description_tr:
💫Welcome to Hieen story!
1.  All supplies are available.
2.  Guarantee brand quality, you can buy with confidence.
3.  Ready stock Products, shipping in 24 hours.
4.  Dispatch from Bankn. Under normal circumstances, you can receive packages on 1-3 days.
5.  If you have any questions, please contact customer service immediately.

The goods are already in North Jakarta with lots of stock and can be sent quickly.
🧑🎤 Valid for the following products.
✅ Compatible with Android/iPhone
✅ Compatible with PC/Laptop
✅ For Bluetooth enabled devices

🧑🎤Product Parameters
⭐ 【Model】: M10
⭐ 【Sound quality】: 10D Bass HiFi Stereo
⭐ 【Product Name】: Wireless Bluetooth Headset
⭐[Wearing method]: In the ear
⭐ 【Bluetooth Version】: 5.1
⭐ 【Earphone】: 80mAh
⭐ 【power bank】: 3800mAh
⭐ 【Charging interface】: M10,M19,M30,F9-5:USB Mirco (G36-G42:TYPE-C)
⭐【Applicable equipment】: Mobile phone/computer/Bluetooth device
⭐【Waterproof level】: IPX7
⭐【Communication distance】: 15m


🧑🎤Operation details
⭐1. Rotate/Pause (Left/Right x 1)
⭐2. Volume + (R x 3)
⭐3. Volume - (L x 3)
⭐4. Skip to previous song (length x 2)
⭐5. Skip to the next song (R x 2)
⭐6. Answer/End (Left/Right x 1)
⭐7. Calling series (left/right x 2 seconds)

In the box (packaging):
1 x TWS Bluetooth headset (left and right ears)
1 charging container
1 x USB charging cable
1 x User Manual
